revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly><!--
-->{{Category explanation|'''{{{3}}}''' established in the '''[[{{{1}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}}]]'''}}
{{Category series navigation}}

{{category see also if exists|{{{3}}} disestablished in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}}}
{{#if:{{{parent|}}}|[[Category:{{{parent}}} established in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}]]|[[Category:{{{1}}}-{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}} establishments]]}}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[Category:{{{3}}} established in the {{{2}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|millennium BC|millennium}}| {{PAGENAME}}]]|}}
[[Category:{{{3}}} by century of establishment|{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|0}}{{{1}}}]]</includeonly>
<!--Last line of your template code--><noinclude><!--
-->{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

<!--Last line of your template code--><noinclude><!--

</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- -->{{Category explanation|'''{{{3}}}''' established in the '''[[{{{1}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation}}
{{category see also if exists|{{{3}}} disestablished in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}}} {{#if:{{{parent|}}}||}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}||}} </includeonly> <!--Last line of your template code--><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:{{{parent}}} established in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}]] [[Category:{{{1}}}-{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}} establishments]] [[Category:{{{3}}} established in the {{{2}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|millennium BC|millennium}}| {{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:{{{3}}} by century of establishment|{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|0}}{{{1}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly><!-- -->{{Category explanation|'''{{{3}}}''' established in the '''[[{{{1}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation}}
{{category see also if exists|{{{3}}} disestablished in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}}} {{#if:{{{parent|}}}||}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}||}} </includeonly> <!--Last line of your template code--><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:{{{parent}}} established in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}]] [[Category:{{{1}}}-{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}} establishments]] [[Category:{{{3}}} established in the {{{2}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|millennium BC|millennium}}| {{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:{{{3}}} by century of establishment|{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|0}}{{{1}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstcatCenturyType here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstcatCenturyType for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- -->{{Category explanation|'''{{{3}}}''' established in the '''[[{{{1}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation}}
{{category see also if exists|{{{3}}} disestablished in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}}} {{#if:{{{parent|}}}||}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}||}} </includeonly> <!--Last line of your template code--><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:{{{parent}}} established in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}]] [[Category:{{{1}}}-{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}} establishments]] [[Category:{{{3}}} established in the {{{2}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|millennium BC|millennium}}| {{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:{{{3}}} by century of establishment|{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|0}}{{{1}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstcatCenturyType for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{Category explanation|'''{{{3}}}''' established in the '''[[{{{1}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}}]]'''}}
{{Category series navigation}}

{{category see also if exists|{{{3}}} disestablished in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}}}
{{#if:{{{parent|}}}||}}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}||}}
</includeonly>
<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:{{{parent}}} established in the {{{1}}} century {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|BC}}]]
[[Category:{{{1}}}-{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|century BC|century}} establishments]]
[[Category:{{{3}}} established in the {{{2}}} {{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|millennium BC|millennium}}| {{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:{{{3}}} by century of establishment|{{#ifexist:{{{4}}}|0}}{{{1}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
